---
title: "List Accounting Vendors"
description: "List all vendors for the current accounting connection."
api: "GET https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors"
---

<Note>
  These are accounting (COA) vendors used to tag transactions. For bill pay vendors, see the [Vendors](/api-reference/vendors/list) section.
</Note>

## Response

<ResponseField name="data" type="array">
  <Expandable title="data[]">
    <ResponseField name="accounting_connection_id" type="string" required />
    <ResponseField name="id" type="string" />
    <ResponseField name="ramp_id" type="string" required />
    <ResponseField name="name" type="string" required />
    <ResponseField name="code" type="string" />
    <ResponseField name="is_active" type="boolean" required />
    <ResponseField name="is_synced" type="boolean" required />
    <ResponseField name="provider_name" type="string" required />
    <ResponseField name="created_at" type="string (date)" required />
    <ResponseField name="updated_at" type="string (date)" required />
    <ResponseField name="vendor_category_info" type="object">
      <Expandable title="vendor_category_info">
        <ResponseField name="id" type="string" />
        <ResponseField name="name" type="string" />
        <ResponseField name="ramp_id" type="string" />
      </Expandable>
    </ResponseField>
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>
<ResponseField name="page" type="object">
  <Expandable title="page">
    <ResponseField name="next" type="string" />
  </Expandable>
</ResponseField>
